question: For the quarterly data platform, which statement is best supported by the 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: Q3 has the highest proportion of online searches among all quarters.
options.B: Q1 has the highest number of online searches compared to the other quarters.
options.C: The sum of all three metrics in each quarter can be used to measure overall platform performance.
options.D: All three metrics have identical patterns across the four quarters because each bar reaches 100%.

explanation: 100% stacking normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking (e.g., one metric > another in every quarter). Invalid inferences include cross-quarter total comparisons or combining unrelated categories.
